since_last: 55% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.46%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.52% · BTC -2.96% · Gold +0.56% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 55% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.46%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Data Center, Power & Energy lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.46%; weakest is Data Center, Power & Energy at -0.61%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +21.56%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +21.56%, AVAV +14.88%, VRT +7.61%, MRVL +6.83%, CEVA +6.60%. Laggards: DLR -5.05%, TTD -4.69%, SMR -4.34%, HON -3.89%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.33% at $169.66
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.33% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
